'''Niquon''' was the [[Jedi Watchman/Legends|Jedi Watchman]] of [[Yabosta]] and its moon, [[Skalokor]].

==Biography==
Niquon dwelt on Skalokor, where he trained his [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]], [[Nason Laric]]. His friends included [[Lowghen Badra]] and [[Borta (Dolandu)|Borta]] the [[Dolandu]]. Niquon once sent Laric to take the ruins of an [[Assassin droid/Legends|assassin droid]] discovered by Borta to Lowghen Badra on Yabosta. The [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] [[Von Totha]] waylaid Laric to get him out of her way so she or her allies would be free to assassinate Niquon, but Lowghen Badra helped him escape. Laric then rescued Niquon from a [[Drethi/Legends|Drethi]] sent to Skalokor by Totha's group.<ref name="Jedi's Legacy" />
